# Clinking Bubbles

> Clinking Bubbles is a private event bartending company serving New Jersey and New York. We provide professional bartenders, curated signature cocktails, and full bar setups for weddings, parties, corporate events, and special occasions.

Clinking Bubbles LLC is based in Mountainside, NJ. Bookings include a full consultation, bar goods (cups, napkins, straws, garnishes), and ice with premium coolers. Guests must be 21+ to be served alcohol.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.clinkingbubbles.com/): Overview of our private bartending services
- [About](https://www.clinkingbubbles.com/about): Who we are and our story
- [Services](https://www.clinkingbubbles.com/services): Complete package details and what we bring
- [Booking Process](https://www.clinkingbubbles.com/booking-process): How booking an event works, step by step
- [Alcohol Calculator](https://www.clinkingbubbles.com/alcohol-calculator): Estimate how much alcohol your event needs
- [FAQ](https://www.clinkingbubbles.com/faq): Frequently asked questions
- [Contact](https://www.clinkingbubbles.com/contact): Get a quote for your event
